'''Jake Harthan''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] from the [[Tion Hegemony/Legends|Tion Hegemony]], the son of Counselor [[Harthan]].

==Biography==
When they were sent to [[Tahlboor]] around [[6 BBY/Legends|5.5 BBY]], he became aware of the [[sky cannon]] and decided to seize it by provoking the [[Troob]]s and [[Hobor]]s into a genocidal war through the murder of [[Ket Krax]] and the blaming of [[Larka Nimondro]]. However, the plot was foiled by [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] just before the two peoples were to go to war. Although he attempted to gain the power of [[Mount Yeroc]], a Troob killed him with a spear.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Protocol Offensive]]'' {{1st}}
